commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 26:15 To Obed-edom southward; and to his sons the storehouse. Protestants, "To Obededom southward, and to his sons, the house of Asuppim. "(Haydock) This term may denote the "revenue "where the offerings, destined for the support of the priests, were collected, Exodus xxxiv. We find the same word used for the offerings received at the door of the temple, 2 Esdras xii. It may also mean the house "of the assemblies "(Calmet) where the 72 judges of the Sanhedrim met. (Villalpand) (Tirinus).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
